title: The Last Supper: Filmworks XXII
notes: Includes a 50 page full color photo booklet of stills from the film.

videos.description:
FilmWorks XXII: The Last Supper (2008)

This score is for Arno Bouchard's 2009 short science fiction/art film 'The Last Supper'. You can see the trailer here: https://youtu.be/FFhj082tmTs



The Man goes to the encounter of the Woman in a mysterious plac
